title: Daleel Al-Suez
description: A modern digital business directory platform for Suez Governorate that helps users discover local businesses, services, restaurants, shops, doctors, and companies through an organized and searchable interface. The platform focuses on improving local business visibility and simplifying access to trusted information for residents and visitors.

title: Daleel Al-Suez Tools
description: A collection of online productivity and utility tools designed to simplify everyday digital tasks. The platform provides fast, lightweight, and user-friendly tools accessible directly from the browser without requiring installation or registration.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A responsive personal portfolio website created to showcase projects, technical skills, and development experience with a clean user interface and smooth interactive animations.
